title: OMFS Template - Follow-up
bodyTemplate:
Subjective
[Age] old [Patient Gender (Male/Female)] w/ history of omfs-template-follow-up:blank:0 presents to WR OMFS for follow up s/p omfs-template-follow-up:blank:1, DOS omfs-template-follow-up:blank:2. Denies nausea, vomiting, fever, chills, shortness of breath, chest pain.
Health history detailed in previous evaluation note. No changes to medical hx.

Objective
[pfs_adm_med_vital_signs]

Focused Physical Exam:
GEN: Pt sitting comfortably in bed/chair in NAD. AAOx3
HEAD: Normocephalic/Atraumatic (NCAT), no abrasions, lesions, lacerations, masses, erythema, or discoloration
EYES: EOMI, PERRLA, vision grossly intact x2
EARS: Atraumatic, no otorrhea
NOSE: Atraumatic, no rhinorrhea
ORAL: All surgical sites well approximated. Uvula midline, tonsillar pillars non-deviated, floor-of-mouth non-raised and soft. No concerning pathology noted. Oral Hygiene: fair. Maxillary gingival tissues are pink and well perfused with capillary refill of less than 2 seconds. Mallampati: 2
TMJ: WNL, MIO 40mm+
NECK: full ROM, soft, supple, non-tender, thyromental distance 3 fingerbreadths.
CARD: Distal extremities well perfused
RESP: Equal non-labored chest rise bilaterally, no audible wheezing or stridor
NEURO: CN II-XII grossly intact

Assessment
[Age] old [Patient Gender (Male/Female)] s/p omfs-template-follow-up:blank:3, DOS omfs-template-follow-up:blank:4. Progressing as expected_

Plan:
Follow up in omfs-template-follow-up:blank:5

[pfs_discharge_medications]
include:.sacsign_
